zh.lifeSummary: 當Cassandra de Argentein於1240年出生在英國賀特福爾格亞特 維蒙德利時，她的父親Sir Giles Argentine31歲，母親Margery Aguillon19歲。她和Sir Ralph Perrott至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1279年在英國英格蘭艾可登莫福享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cassandra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek legend. Cassandra was a Trojan princess blessed with the gift of prophecy but cursed with the fate that nobody would ever believe her. She was brought back to Greece as a captive concubine by Agamemnon, but met her death at the hands of his jealous wife Clytemnestra. Although it was never generally popular, this name was in occasional use from the Middle Ages until the 18th century, and has recently been revived by parents looking to the pages of classical mythology for distinctive names.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Cassandra de Argentein was born in 1240, in Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Sir Giles Argentine, was 31 and her mother, Margery Aguillon, was 19. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Ralph Perrott. She died in 1279, in Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cassandra de Argentein est née en 1240, à Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Giles Argentine, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margery Aguillon, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Ralph Perrott. Elle est décédée en 1279, à Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cassandra de Argentein 1240 in Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Giles Argentine 31 und ihre Mutter Margery Aguillon 19. Sie hatte mit Sir Ralph Perrott mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1279 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Ralph Perrott. Morì nel 1279, nel Dunmow, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cassandra de Argenteinが1240年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアグレアト ウイモンドリーで生まれた時，父Sir Giles Argentineは31歳，母Margery Aguillonは19歳であった。彼女はSir Ralph Perrottとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1279年にイギリスイギリスエセックスダンモウで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cassandra de Argentein(이)가 1240년 영국 허트퍼드실르 그리트 윈이몽리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Giles Argentine(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Aguillon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Sir Ralph Perrott(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 던모에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cassandra de Argentein родилась в 1240 г. в местности грит вимондли, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Giles Argentine было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Aguillon, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Ralph Perrott. Она умерла в 1279 г. в местности дунмоу, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.
